creator: bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu
text:
Just a quick update:

I've run into a snag on this.  Xorg 7.2 dropped support for a GL global 
called glwDrawingAreaWidgetClass, and now only offers 
glwMDrawingAreaWidgetClass (there are Xt and Motif versions of the same 
class with virtually identical APIs, but different defaults).  The AFNI 
program "suma" depends on the Xt version.  It's easy enough to modify 
the suma code to use the Motif version, in which case it compiles fine, 
but doesn't run correctly.  I've contacted both the xorg team and the 
author of suma, and I'll get back to you as soon as I have a solution.

Regards,

    Jason
